title: Gynzy Education Platform
shortDescription: Cross-platform educational software built with Flutter and Ember.js for classrooms.
description: Contributing to Gynzy's interactive education platform used by teachers and students. Working as a fullstack medior developer building features across the Flutter mobile/desktop app and the Ember.js web application. Focus on delivering intuitive, reliable tools for classroom use.

title: Cloud Infrastructure & CI/CD
shortDescription: Azure cloud solutions and DevOps pipelines across multiple enterprise clients.
description: Designed and maintained cloud infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines for six enterprise clients at Info Support — including Air Miles, Moba Group, and Agrifac Machinery. Built infrastructure-as-code with Bicep, automated deployments via Azure DevOps, and developed .NET microservices running on Azure Functions.
features: Automated CI/CD pipelines in Azure DevOps

title: HoloLens AR Workspaces
shortDescription: Virtual screens in augmented reality on the Microsoft HoloLens 2 for remote workers.
description: Built an augmented reality application for the Microsoft HoloLens 2 that creates virtual screens for remote office workers. The project explored how AR can replace physical monitors, enabling flexible workspaces anywhere. Developed with Unity3D, C#, UWP, and the Mixed Reality Toolkit.
features: Virtual screen placement in AR space
Hand tracking and gesture interaction via MRTK
Spatial anchoring for persistent screen positions

title: Mobile App — Colours Agency
shortDescription: Cross-platform mobile application built with React Native at a digital agency.
description: Developed a cross-platform mobile application during an internship at Colours, a digital agency in 's-Hertogenbosch. Gained hands-on experience building production React Native apps, working within a professional team, and delivering for real clients.

title: This Portfolio
shortDescription: The site you're looking at — built with React, Three.js, and Framer Motion.
description: A bold, modern developer portfolio featuring a 3D interactive hero, theme switching, scroll-driven animations, and responsive design. Built to showcase fullstack development skills.
features: 3D interactive hero with React Three Fiber
